calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Timothy Scott McClaren

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;

Matter not reported.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. appeared represented by Douglas Wallace
Defendant Timothy Scott McClaren was not present

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Bank of America and against Defendant Timothy Scott McClaren.

Plaintiff Bank of America is awarded judgment against Defendant Timothy Scott McClaren as follows:

Damages/Principal: $11,841.98
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Costs: $503.70
Total Judgment: $12,345.68

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-02-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
